title: Top 5 Indie Horror Games You Should Play Tonight
content_body:
Indie horror games continue to dominate the gaming scene with creative storytelling and intense atmosphere.

Here are five indie horror games worth trying:
- Lethal Company
- Phasmophobia
- Iron Lung
- Inside the Backrooms
- Content Warning

These games focus more on tension and immersion than expensive graphics, making them unforgettable experiences for horror fans.

Support the creator on Ko-fi for more gaming reviews, guides, and weekly recommendations.
excerpt: Discover five indie horror games every horror fan should experience.
seo_title: Best Indie Horror Games to Play in 2026
seo_description: Explore the top indie horror games delivering terrifying gameplay and unforgettable experiences.
